info.name: InsightFace Face Verification
info.description:
Postman collection for the InsightFace Face Verification Service (Port 8002).

Set the `base_url` collection variable to `http://localhost:8002` for local testing.

Recommended order:
1. GET /health
2. POST /verify/face with matching selfie + ID
3. POST /verify/face with non-matching selfie — expect face_mismatch

request.description: Health check. Returns 200 when the buffalo_l model is loaded and the service is ready to accept requests.

formdata.description: UUID — passed through from NestJS for response correlation
JPEG / PNG / WEBP selfie image of the guardian
JPEG / PNG / WEBP ID document image (forwarded by NestJS from Redis)

request.description:
Full face verification pipeline: detect faces in both images → compare ArcFace embeddings via cosine similarity (threshold 0.42).

NestJS branches on `success` and `error.code` in the response.

response.name: No Match — face_mismatch
No Match — face_not_detected_selfie
System Error
